'''makuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foaf|foaf]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foaf|foaf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| makuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mækiwith|mækiwith]] || [[word:mækiwij|mækiwij]] || [[word:mækiwish|mækiwish]] || [[word:mækiwi|mækiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:makukuwuth|makukuwuth]] || [[word:makukuwuj|makukuwuj]] || [[word:makukuwush|makukuwush]] || [[word:makukuwu|makukuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:makuwuth|makuwuth]] || [[word:makuwuj|makuwuj]] || [[word:makuwush|makuwush]] || [[word:makuwu|makuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:makufwuth|makufwuth]] || [[word:makufwuj|makufwuj]] || [[word:makufwush|makufwush]] || [[word:makufwuf|makufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:makuwuthu|makuwuthu]] || [[word:makuwuju|makuwuju]] || [[word:makuwushu|makuwushu]] || [[word:makuwuku|makuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:makuwuth|makuwuth]] || [[word:makuwuj|makuwuj]] || [[word:makuwush|makuwush]] || [[word:makuwu|makuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:makuwuthul|makuwuthul]] || [[word:makuwujul|makuwujul]] || [[word:makuwushul|makuwushul]] || [[word:makuwukul|makuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:makuwuthuthu|makuwuthuthu]] || [[word:makuwujuju|makuwujuju]] || [[word:makuwushushu|makuwushushu]] || [[word:makuwuku|makuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:makuwuthun|makuwuthun]] || [[word:makuwujun|makuwujun]] || [[word:makuwushun|makuwushun]] || [[word:makuwukun|makuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:makuwuthuoro|makuwuthuoro]] || [[word:makuwujuoro|makuwujuoro]] || [[word:makuwushuoro|makuwushuoro]] || [[word:makuwukuoro|makuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
